name: Candy Sprinkled Marshmallow Chex Mix
recipeIngredient: 4 cups corn chex or rice chex cereal
20 red or green hard peppermint candies, coarsely crushed (1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray cookie sheet with cooking spray.
3. Mix popcorn and cereal in a large bowl and set aside.
4. Microwave marshmallow creme in a medium microwaveable bowl, uncovered on high for 1 minute. Stir.
5. Microwave for an additional 1 minute or until melted. Stir.
6. Pour the melted marshmallow creme over the popcorn mixture and stir until evenly coated.
7. Sprinkle with the crushed peppermint candies.
8. Spread the mixture on the prepared cookie sheet.
9. Bake for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Bake for an additional 5 minutes or until the coating is light golden brown.
10. Spread on wax paper or aluminum foil to cool.
11. Store tightly covered in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.
